subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison. Verily, it enjoineth thee to that which shall draw thee nigh unto God, the Lord of all worlds. Say: O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی اسمع ندائی من شطر سجنی انه یامرک بما یقربک الی الله رب العالمین قل یا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
